testcase.name: test_market_ticker

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'items' in [{'change_percent': 6.3, 'creator_symbol': '$EMMA', 'is_positive': True, 'price': 31.88, ...}, {'change_percent': 5.13, 'creator_symbol': '$EMMA', 'is_positive': True, 'price': 53.08, ...}, {'change_percent': 4.48, 'creator_symbol': '$JOE', 'is_positive': True, 'price': 141.99, ...}, {'change_percent': 1.33, 'creator_symbol': '$ALEX', 'is_positive': True, 'price': 42.6, ...}, {'change_percent': 13.6, 'creator_symbol': '$ALEX', 'is_positive': True, 'price': 83.26, ...}, {'change_percent': 3.69, 'creator_symbol': '$TECH', 'is_positive': True, 'price': 89.4, ...}, ...]

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_comprehensive.py:46: in test_market_ticker assert "items" in data E AssertionError: assert 'items' in [{'change_percent': 6.3, 'creator_symbol': '$EMMA', 'is_positive': True, 'price': 31.88, ...}, {'change_percent': 5.13, 'creator_symbol': '$EMMA', 'is_positive': True, 'price': 53.08, ...}, {'change_percent': 4.48, 'creator_symbol': '$JOE', 'is_positive': True, 'price': 141.99, ...}, {'change_percent': 1.33, 'creator_symbol': '$ALEX', 'is_positive': True, 'price': 42.6, ...}, {'change_percent': 13.6, 'creator_symbol': '$ALEX', 'is_positive': True, 'price': 83.26, ...}, {'change_percent': 3.69, 'creator_symbol': '$TECH', 'is_positive': True, 'price': 89.4, ...}, ...]
